texto: I was watching 'Mr. Roger's Neighborhood', 'Sesame Street', 'Electric Company', 'Romper Room', and 'Villa Alegre!' when I said to my self, 'Hey, self! Wouldn't it be fun to be one of those kids on the TV?' My mom thought it was a pretty good idea, too... and she instantly moved us from the Bay Area to Malibu... nice.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Keith Coogan que provoca temas ligados a autoestima. Ao questionar “I was watching 'Mr. Roger's Neighborhood', 'Sesame Street', 'Electric Company', 'Romper Room', an…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre autoestima, good, self, com foco em self e fun.
